phase.name: Project Scaffold
phase.goal: Vite + KAPLAY + TypeScript project with dev server running

phase.name: Title Screen and Game Start
phase.goal: Styled title menu, New Game starts a run, scene management

phase.name: Room Navigation and Floor Layout
phase.goal: Authored floor with 6 rooms, styled room UI, exit buttons, room-type visual differentiation, fog of war

phase.name: Combat System
phase.goal: Turn-based combat with Fight/Spells/Bag/Run, HP bars, enemy sprites, XP/crystal rewards

phase.name: Rune Forge and Spell Crafting
phase.goal: Forge UI, rune combination, crafted spells usable in combat, affinity tracking (G2 gate)

phase.name: Pressure Mechanics and Ingenuity
phase.goal: Enemy resistances, resource pressure, encounters requiring crafted spells (G4 gate)

phase.name: Dialogue, NPCs, and Events
phase.goal: NPC dialogue with portraits, choice options, event rooms, shop

phase.name: HUD, Menus, and Overlays
phase.goal: Persistent HUD, overlay menus (Map, Bag, Spellbook, Stats/Traits), color-coded statuses

phase.name: Floor 2, Boss Encounters, Save/Load
phase.goal: Second floor with different constraints, boss gates, JSON content packs, localStorage persistence

phase.name: Final Polish and Production Build
phase.goal: Full game loop verification, no softlocks, visual polish, ARCHITECTURE.md, dist/ build
